meaning: n.一阵(风),一股(气流),爆炸,冲击波vt.爆炸,,毁灭,使枯萎,损害
examples: The blast burst Ollie Williams' eardrum.
The blast may have vaporized the meteorite.
The blast caused several buildings to catch fire.
The raft smacks into the first rapid and baptizes us with an icy blast.
By that he means he keeps his blast furnace and rolling mills running as much as possible.
